name: Funnel Conversion Rates
description: Track conversion rates across the full funnel (Lead through Closed Won) under cohort-consistent definitions. Replaces snapshot math that wobbles week-to-week with stable rates derived from completed cohort journeys.
alsoSurfaces: What's our full-funnel conversion rate from lead to closed-won?
Where in the funnel is the worst drop-off?
How are stage-pair rates trending over the last 12 months?
Which segments convert at above-average rates?
beforeWeRun: Time period coverage: trailing 6 months, 12 months, or custom?
Stage transitions to display: all seven, or focus on specific pairs?
Lifecycle window per stage pair: tenant defaults or override?

whatYoullGet.name: Headline metrics
whatYoullGet.desc: Lead-to-won conversion rate, median time-to-close, worst drop-off stage.

whatYoullGet.name: Funnel visualization
whatYoullGet.desc: Classic funnel chart showing each stage's volume and drop-off rate.

whatYoullGet.name: Stage-pair rates table
whatYoullGet.desc: Sortable: completed-cohort rate, in-flight rate, time-to-conversion, drop-off rate per pair.

whatYoullGet.name: Conversion trend
whatYoullGet.desc: Multi-line chart showing each stage-pair conversion rate over time.

whatYoullGet.name: By segment
whatYoullGet.desc: Sortable table of stage-pair rates per segment with full-funnel rate.

whatYoullGet.name: Drop-off severity
whatYoullGet.desc: Bar chart ranking stages by drop-off magnitude with health-band coloring.

whatYoullGet.name: In-flight cohort tracker
whatYoullGet.desc: Card list of cohorts still progressing through the funnel.

callout: 4 quick inputs, then Sage builds your conversion-rates dashboard in ~9 min.
